key_metrics.post_term_noncompete: 2 years within 10 miles or Territory (greater of)

headline_risks: Financial condition: low absolute equity ($345,862) vs initial investment range ($540K-$869K) and large deferred franchise fees ($3.43M); however auditor (Reese CPA LLC) issued an unmodified clean opinion with NO going-concern modification. IL fee deferral and VA disclosure remain in force.
42 signed franchise agreements not yet opened vs 40 operating — large unopened backlog
Supplier control 70-90% — one of the highest in the preschool category
Franchisor reserves right to access all franchisee technology data without notice, and controls all online presence
Territory is thin: lesser of 125K pop or 3-mile radius; no protection against franchisor customer solicitation inside Territory
Post-FDD acquisition: Aug 29, 2025 acquired by Crux I Ivybrook (Aggregator), LP (Dallas-based PE aggregator) — not reflected in FY2024 financial statements
preserved_contradictions: Exhibit K vs Exhibit L labeling mismatch between TOC, Item 20 body, How-to-Use Q&A, and physical exhibit headers
How-to-Use Q&A places financial statements in Exhibit K; TOC and Item 21 place them in Exhibit J
Item 19 Table 2C 3Y+ cohort size = 18; Table 3 narrative says 19 and row sum is 19
Gross Revenue defined differently in Item 6 Note 2 (includes business interruption proceeds) vs Item 19 Note 3 (no mention)
Item 11 refers to 'once per quarter in 2024' training schedule in a document amended September 15, 2025 (stale)
Trademark ownership: Item 1 vs Exhibit J Note 1 — Ivybrook Franchising vs McWilliams Properties
Catapult formation date: Item 1 says 2019-10-25 vs Note 1 says 2022-10-25
Advertising expense: income statement $128,504 vs Note 1 narrative $118,504
tool_limitations: poppler/pdftoppm not installed — no raster rendering path
tesseract/pytesseract not installed — no OCR fallback
Exhibit J (pages 168-197) is image-only; text layer contains only running header and document reference, no statement content
